author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 9 APPROVE-WITH-FOLLOW-UPS. 5 BROKEN tests (#1045-#1049) strengthened (Phase 4 xpu pattern): else-branch asserts auto().is_some() when available (#1045), typed fn-pointer pins for CubeRuntime::new (#1046) and portable_add/matmul via shared PortableBinaryOp alias (#1048/#1049), assert_eq! replacing discarded let _ (#1047 substring preserved for surface-gate). Sabotage demo: ordinal value 1 → 99 caught at line 829. Follow-up #1083 filed for pub(crate) fn CubeRuntime::new_for_testing src/ change. No src/ changes, no new workspace deps.
